data.title: Buy Rating for Munters Group AB: Overcoming AirTech Challenges with Strong DCT and FoodTech Performance
data.description:
Adela Dashian has given her Buy rating due to a combination of factors that indicate potential for Munters Group AB’s stock. Despite revising the earnings per share forecasts for the years 2025 to 2027 downward by 5-7% due to challenges in the AirTech segment, such as weak battery demand and low utilization, there are positive aspects that support a Buy rating.
Strong performance in the Data Center Technologies (DCT) and FoodTech divisions, along with operational improvements, suggest a mid-term recovery. Additionally, the stock is currently trading at a significant discount compared to its peak levels and industry peers. This, coupled with structural growth drivers and improving fundamentals, makes the stock an attractive investment opportunity.

According to TipRanks, Dashian is a 2-star analyst with an average return of 2.0% and a 37.50% success rate. Dashian covers the Industrials sector, focusing on stocks such as Munters Group AB, Systemair AB, and Tomra Systems ASA.

In another report released on September 11, Kepler Capital also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a SEK155.00 price target.

data.title: Cautious Outlook on Halma plc: Sell Rating Amid Positive Revenue Growth and Cash Flow Concerns
data.description:
David Farrell has given his Sell rating due to a combination of factors that, despite some positive developments, suggest caution. The recent trading update from Halma plc indicates an upgrade in organic revenue growth expectations, particularly driven by the Avo Photonics business, which is now projected to grow significantly more than previously anticipated. However, this positive outlook is tempered by concerns over weak cash conversion in the first half of the fiscal year, which, although expected to align by the end of the fiscal year, raises some red flags.
Additionally, while there are favorable elements such as reduced foreign exchange headwinds and a financial gain from a license transaction, these are not enough to offset the underlying concerns. The market may react positively to the revenue guidance upgrade, but the overall financial health and operational efficiency, as indicated by cash flow issues, suggest a more cautious stance is warranted. Therefore, despite some promising aspects, the overall assessment leads to a Sell rating.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
